name: smng-ti-schema
description: smng-ti 공유 데이터 스키마 (관측치·집계 시세 계약)

scripts.schemas: npm run build && npm run schemas:emit
scripts.prepare: npm run build && npm run schemas:emit
scripts.validate:itemdb: npm run build && node scripts/validate-contract.mjs itemdb
scripts.validate:observation: npm run build && node scripts/validate-contract.mjs observation
